flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Pikeville fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of Pikeville rose 34% between 2021 and 2024 (31.0% → 41.7%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Pikeville rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 (23.2% → 28.6%).
